Our Story

More than photos —
memories.

Windy City Moments was born from a simple belief: every celebration deserves to be remembered. Based in Chicago, we bring a premium digital photo booth experience to weddings, corporate events, birthday parties, and everything in between.

We handle every detail — from delivery and setup to teardown — so you can be fully present with your guests. Our professional attendant is on-site throughout your event, ensuring a seamless, joyful experience from the first click to the last print.

Whether you're planning an intimate backyard gathering or a grand ballroom celebration, we're here to make it unforgettable.

Serving Chicago · North Shore · South Side · Suburbs
